title: dichanthelium commutatum
intro: Dichanthelium commutatum, also known as panic grass or deer grass, is a species of grass native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including colds, fever, and respiratory problems, and its herbal preparations, such as infusions and decoctions, have been used to make teas and tonics. However, more research is needed to confirm its full range of health benefits and potential side effects, and it should be used under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
